title: rhamnales
intro: The taxonomical rank of Rhamnales is an order of flowering plants, characterized by its distinct characteristics and evolutionary relationships. This order includes a diverse range of plant families, such as Rhamnaceae, which comprises buckthorns and other related species. Other notable families within the Rhamnales order include Celastraceae, which includes the bittersweet nightshade, and Leeaceae.

families.family_desc: Welwitschiaceae is a family of flowering plants in the order Araioleae, which are cycads and are primarily native to Africa.
